HomePage.title: Build Your Own <spanInner>E-commerce</spanInner> Empire.
HomePage.subtitle: Sell Masr provides everything you need to start, manage, and grow your dropshipping business in the Egyptian market. No inventory needed.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: Built specifically for the unique dynamics of the Egyptian market.

suppliers.title: Verified Suppliers
suppliers.desc: Access thousands of high-quality products from trusted local and international suppliers.

cod.title: Cash on Delivery
cod.desc: Full support for COD, the preferred payment method in Egypt, with reliable collection.

shipping.title: Fast Shipping
shipping.desc: Network of local shipping partners ensuring your customers get their orders in record time.

Footer.description: The premier dropshipping solution for Egypt. Start your business today with zero upfront costs.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Stay updated with the latest dropshipping tips and products.
